sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85492" key="polufqerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-φθερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n85492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subject to many forms of destruction,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄνθρωποι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
